body:
Replace all print() calls with structlog (JSON format). Add context (user_id, request_id) to log entries. Use proper log levels.

**Scope:**
- Install structlog, configure JSON output
- Replace 336 print() calls across all agents
- Add log levels: INFO for normal ops, WARN for degraded, ERROR for failures
- Add request context (correlation_id pattern from JIE)
- Remove bare `except:` blocks (7 files) — use specific exceptions + log

**Current state:** Zero use of logging module. 7 bare except: blocks. 56 generic Exception handlers.
title: refactor: replace 336 print() calls with structured logging
